steps.title: Test the all-volcano claim
steps.content: The student's claim is that all volcanoes in Ecuador are shield volcanoes. To weaken that claim, the table must show that at least one Ecuadoran volcano listed is not a shield volcano.

steps.title: Use the counterexample
steps.content: A is factually wrong because Chacana and Chimborazo are not both shield volcanoes. B discusses eruption dates, not the type claim. D is factually wrong because Fernandina is a shield volcano. The answer is C.
